prompts.title: Urban Explorer in Historic European City
prompts.prompt: A candid travel photograph of [Subject] with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. They are walking through a narrow cobblestone street in a historic European city such as Rome or Paris, wearing a stylish casual outfit — a well-fitted jacket, jeans, and comfortable shoes. Elegant old buildings, cafés, and subtle street activity fill the background, creating an authentic European atmosphere. Warm afternoon sunlight casts soft golden tones and long shadows across the street. Captured in a realistic travel photography style with natural movement and depth, shallow depth of field, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures. Shot on a full-frame camera with an 88mm lens, f/1.8 aperture, natural bokeh. 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Morning Stroll by the Venice Canals
prompts.prompt: A candid travel photograph of [Subject] with medium complexion, wavy brown hair tied back, walking along a canal in Venice. Wearing a light linen shirt, cropped trousers, and leather sandals. Gondolas float in the water, with colorful buildings reflecting in the calm morning light. Soft morning sunlight illuminates the scene, creating warm highlights and gentle shadows. Captured in photorealistic travel photography style with shallow depth of field, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures. Shot on a full-frame camera with 50mm lens, f/2.0 aperture. 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Sunset Hike in Santorini
prompts.prompt: A travel photograph of [Subject], a male only, with light tan complexion and short blonde hair, wearing a casual light linen shirt and trousers, standing on a cliff overlooking the Aegean Sea in Santorini. Vibrant blue domes and whitewashed buildings surround the horizon. Warm sunset light bathes the scene, highlighting the textures of the cliffs and sea. Photorealistic style, cinematic composition, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed textures, natural movement. Shot on a 35mm lens, f/2.2 aperture. 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Cycling Through Amsterdam’s Streets
prompts.prompt: A candid travel photograph of [Subject] with fair complexion, shoulder-length black hair, riding a vintage bicycle through Amsterdam’s narrow streets lined with brick buildings and flower boxes. Wearing casual attire: denim jacket, t-shirt, sneakers. Morning sunlight filters through the trees, creating soft shadows. Photorealistic style, natural motion, shallow depth of field, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures. Shot on 50mm lens, f/1.8. 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Adventurous Hiker in Mountain Landscape
prompts.prompt: A cinematic wide-angle adventure photograph of [Subject] with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. They are standing confidently on a rugged mountain trail, gazing out over a breathtaking panoramic landscape of dramatic alpine peaks, deep valleys, and a vast clear blue sky stretching to the horizon. The subject is dressed in realistic hiking gear — a weather-resistant jacket, hiking boots, and a backpack — suggesting an active outdoor journey. The environment features rocky terrain, distant snow-capped mountains, and subtle clouds drifting across the sky, creating a sense of scale and freedom. Bright natural daylight illuminates the landscape, casting crisp shadows and highlighting the textures of stone, grass, and distant ridges. Captured in a realistic outdoor adventure photography style with cinematic composition, strong depth, and natural color grading that emphasizes the grandeur of nature. Shot on a full-frame camera with a 24mm wide-angle lens at f/4 aperture, capturing expansive scenery with sharp detail and natural perspective. 9:16 aspect ratio.
